core_config.description: Governed feedback, requests, observations, and responses from people or agents.

column_config.name: post_id
column_config.description: Stable post identifier supplied by the submitting person or agent.

column_config.name: reply_to_post_id
column_config.description: Optional parent post id when this post is a response.

column_config.name: submitted_by
column_config.description: Business-facing submitter label or upstream user id.

column_config.name: posted_at
column_config.description: Business timestamp when the post was authored or captured.

column_config.name: body
column_config.description: Plain-language feedback, request, observation, or response.

column_config.name: tags
column_config.description: Optional routing tags such as #request, #bug, #finance, or #spec-gap.

column_config.name: related_area
column_config.description: Optional business area such as finance, operations, support, product, or commerce.

column_config.name: related_process
column_config.description: Optional process this post may lead to, such as reimbursements or budget requests.

column_config.name: details
column_config.description: Optional structured context for source, request, evidence metadata, or agent notes.
